name: Spotted Chocolate Cheesecake W/Lychee Love Liquid
recipeInstructions:
To make crust, melt butter and blend with cookie crumbs. Press over the bottom and slightly up the sides of a greased 10-inch springform pan. Chill.
To make filling, cream the cheeses on slow speed of a mixer. Then add sugar. Blend until smooth, adding vanilla. Beat in eggs one at a time. Remove one-third of the cheese mixture and set aside. Add warm, not hot, melted chocolate to the remaining cheese mixture. Pour into springform pan. Transfer the reserved cheese mixture into a piping bag. Place the tip well into the chocolate cheese mixture and squeeze a large even dot in the center. Continue making smaller dots around the batter.
Bake in a 250°F oven for 1 1/2 hours or until firm in the center. Chill.
To make Lychee Love Liquid, blend lychee fruit and lemon juice until smooth. Serve each slice surrounded by a pool of sauce. Makes 12 to 16 servings.
